Macros, encoding, CRC-32, delay functions, conversions, and network utilities for pebble-firmware.


## Files
- **[attributes.h](attributes.h.md)**: Defines macros for function, variable, structure, and general attributes using GCC and Clang attributes.
- **[cobs.c](cobs.c.md)**: Implements COBS encoding for data serialization in the pebble-firmware platform.
- **[cobs.h](cobs.h.md)**: Implementation of Consistent Overhead Byte Stuffing (COBS) encoding with buffer size calculations.
- **[crc32.c](crc32.c.md)**: Nybble-wide table-driven CRC-32 algorithm using a 64-byte lookup table for efficiency.
- **[crc32.h](crc32.h.md)**: Calculates CRC-32 checksums using standard parameters compatible with zlib's crc32 function.
- **[delay.c](delay.c.md)**: Functions for microsecond and millisecond delays using a spin loop on STM32F4 microcontrollers.
- **[delay.h](delay.h.md)**: Functions for microsecond and millisecond delays using busy-waiting.
- **[misc.c](misc.c.md)**: Converts a 32-bit integer to a hexadecimal string with a buffer size check.
- **[misc.h](misc.h.md)**: Utility macros and functions for mathematical operations and conversions in C.
- **[net.h](net.h.md)**: Defines functions and types for network byte-order conversions in C.
